==Tier 1 (White)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!Conversion!!CostxQuantity!!Reward
|-
| rowspan="8" style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" |[[File:Rosary.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="8" |Rosary
| rowspan="8" |19 B-tads
|-
|3x1||Enhancment Injection:<br>Snail HP +180<br>Snail DEF +18
|-
|2x1||Bharata INTEL + 1500
|-
|3x1||B-tads 3000
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll x10
|-
|5x1||[[Gear|Twin Tip Dagger]]
|-
|6x1||[[Gear|Sikh Turban]]
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket
|-
| style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" | [[File:Linden Tree.png|75x75px]]
| Lineden Tree||150 B-tads||3x1||300 W-tads
|-
| style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" | [[File:Spice.png|75x75px]]
| Spice||200 B-tads||4x1||Fungus Chest x40
|-
| style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" | [[File:Henna Tattoo.png|75x75px]]
| Henna Tattoo||Bharata INTEL +330||3x1||Travel Speedup 1h
|}

==Tier 2 (Green)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:#7de87f;" | [[File:Rosary green.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Rosary
|3x3||Enhancement Injection:<br>Snail ATK +4<br>Snail DEF +4
| rowspan="7" | 57 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Bharata INTEL +3000
|-
|3x1||6,000 B-tads
|-
|4x1||Expert Scroll x20
|-
|5x1||[[Gear|<span style="color:#40da25;">Mughal Soldier Helmet</span>]]
|-
|6x1||Gene Speedup
|-
|8x1||Lottery Ticket x2
|-
| style="background-color:#7de87f;" | [[File:Lotus Temple.png|75x75px]]
|Lotus Temple||3x1||Offering Speedup x2h||Offering Speedup +5m
|-
| style="background-color:#7de87f;" | [[File:Humayun's Tomb.png|75x75px]]
|Humayun's Tomb||4x1||Golden Pickaxe||Refine Speedup +5m
|-
| style="background-color:#7de87f;" | [[File:Yoga.png|75x75px]]
|Yoga||3x1||Bharatic Treasure Map||Gene Speedup +5m
|}

==Tier 3 (Blue)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:#7de8e6;" | [[File:Rosary blue.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Rosary
|3x3||Enhancement Injection:<br>Snail HP +200<br>Snail DEF +20
| rowspan="7" | 171 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Bharata INTEL + 4500
|-
|3x1||9,000 B-tads
|-
|4x1||Master Scroll x10
|-
|5x1||[[Gear|<span style="color:#22d3d0;">Mahatma's Robe</span>]]
|-
|6x1||Time Chest x60
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket x2
|-
| style="background-color:#7de8e6;" | [[File:Agra Fort.png|75x75px]]
|Agra Fort||4x1||400 W-tads||Evolution Chest +2
|-
| style="background-color:#7de8e6;" | [[File:Hawa Mahal.png|75x75px]]
|Hawa Mahal||3x1||Toner +20||Fungus Chest +2
|}
==Tier 4 (Purple)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" | [[File:Rosary purple.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Rosary
|3x3||Enhancement Injection:<br>Snail ATK +22<br>Snail DEF +22
| rowspan="7" | 513 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Bharata INTEL +12,000
|-
|3x1||12k B-tads
|-
|4x1||Master Scroll +10
|-
|5x1||[[Gear|<span style="color:var(--purple-text)">Antelope Horn Shield</span>]]
|-
|6x1||Organ Chest 80
|-
|7x2||Lottery Ticket x3
|-
|style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" | [[File:Sahib Temple.png|75x75px]]
|Sahib Temple||3x1||Divine Order Chest x100||Purple Reagent +1
|-
| style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" | [[File:Taj Mahal.png|75x75px]]
|Taj Mahal||4x1||[[Leaf Manuscript]]x20 ||Bharata Treasure Map +2
|}

==Tier 5 (Orange)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:#ffb066;" | [[File:Rosary orange.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Rosary
|3x3||Enhancement Injection:<br>Snail HP +240<br>Snail ATK +24
| rowspan="7" | 1,539 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Bharata INTEL +8,000
|-
|3x1||B-tad +18k
|-
|4x1||Master Scroll +40
|-
|5x1||Dragon Chest +100
|-
|6x2||Lottery Ticket x3
|-
|7x1||[[Gear|<span style="color:var(--orange-text)">Windsor's Cape</span>]]
|-
| style="background-color:#ffb066;" | [[File:The Ganges.png|75x75px]]
|The Ganges||3x1||Wish Coin x2||15 W-tads
|}
